name: Prefrontal — Triage Urgent (push urgent triage to ntfy)

meta.notes: TEMPLATE — the consumer for Prefrontal's outbound events. Set N8N_WEBHOOK_URL (in Prefrontal's .env) to this webhook's production URL; Prefrontal POSTs {event, …} here, and triage.apply() sends event=triage.urgent for urgent signals. This flow filters for that event and pushes to ntfy; add branches for other events (episode.logged, reminder.sent) as needed. If you already run one inbound-webhook workflow, just add the 'Urgent Only' + ntfy branch to it instead of importing this separately (Prefrontal has a single N8N_WEBHOOK_URL).
